query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A portrait of a man with dark hair and a dark shirt featuring an orange and black graphic design on the collar, set against a completely black background. The central face is positioned in the middle of the frame, flanked by two additional partial faces of the same person visible on the left and right sides, creating overlapping facial features that merge together.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal double-exposure portrait showing overlapping faces of the same man merged into one frame, with a central frontal face flanked by two partial side-profile faces dissolving into darkness. The layered exposures create ghosted, repeated facial features against a black void, while the man wears a dark shirt with an orange collar graphic, producing an unsettling dreamlike effect that rejects ordinary portraiture through deliberate overlapping and irrational multiplication of the subject.
